name: Little Love By NoJo Love You To The Moon and Back Round Wood Nursery Wall Décor - Gray and White
description: Brighten up your nursery wall with the positive message, "Love You to the Moon and Back." The beautiful font lends an elegant touch, while the message conveys how special and loved your child will be! The 14" x 14" round, white woodgrain wall art with 3D letters in gray mounts easily hardware not included. Bold enough to be a nursery focal point, yet versatile enough to coordinate with many room designs, your new wood wall art will be the highlight of the nursery!
